textByHash.05b6fa80efe4eef8993b8d2c47b2ef9def232647: I won't be able to do anything if you die somewhere like Castle Wars or the Emir's Arena; they have their own magic to keep you safe.
textByHash.05be396caf378addba84148b9e6e4f7880ac9558: Well, if you'd like, I can make it so you respawn in our Enclave. It'll put you right in the heart of all the chaos that surrounds us.
textByHash.07479de6272a4483da49a8cc35c2abc77f941f5e: How are you finding our sanctuary?
textByHash.0d5639e05fded1c3f55792772a11a1c419f14652: You'll find yourself quite safe inside my enclave - the protective barriers should keep any troublemakers out.
textByHash.10c7aca11f78c9aa54805efed086f3b377face4d: But are you sure? Come and see me if you want to respawn in our Enclave again; I won't need any more money from you.
textByHash.1b7c66047764af53024f645dc34ace8e61a0d7e9: Fair enough, it has been done.
textByHash.1dfd4515bd01ca7ac3767c299e1ec8ed49f986bc: This is how it'll work: When you die, you'll respawn right here in Ferox Enclave, just outside the pub we've set up. You will lose your items as normal of course.
textByHash.1e8d9c17b61816d0e4e02e417485b94bf0fa9b24: I search for knowledge. I want to know what happened to this part of the world.
textByHash.2ef1a72dee95258de55117446c7bd4a84305b667: Come find me if you change your mind.
textByHash.4815a4c1f23f8bc80c0e5ea2e39d3e65d1b75d26: Whilst looking for answers, I slowly turned this broken town into a safe haven for travellers. Welcome to Ferox Enclave.
textByHash.5181877623c8d1f3ad280c54f0e2355ff35dc269: The Wilderness takes a toll on a man's soul. Are you sure you can handle it?
textByHash.52c7fbc68ff77a4ef8ba88538b256c0cf6a66b23: You're surrounded by a relic of a long lost kingdom.
textByHash.69f800b6f6adcac2e4d9708d16c52c0a31175300: It'll cost you though! Transporting you here is no easy task. 5 million coins should do it, that'd be a one time fee of course.
textByHash.86435d3fed844671781f671a3d6228dd4e920aaa: Would you like to respawn back in Ferox Enclave again?
textByHash.8888f4a52cb0ac2fcf058144942b08fc0fd7af21: Understandable, you'd have to be a brave man to be carrying that much gold out here.
textByHash.8aaed2254e3692aa42c008daa211a454756b6afd: It is, but that's why it's needed! Look around, you can see how many others share my opinion.
textByHash.95aeaf8a408395954804e5864b0d7204aae6d7c5: Oh, I couldn't really tell you that.
textByHash.97bba63f354612df3443ab5b9b064e948ef7ca2f: Can't say I blame you, the Wilderness starts to wear down the soul after a while.
textByHash.98dd34d284a8ebfd4401c968181c5e23a36f0225: This place has sat in ruin for an age, slowly destroyed by the harsh climate of the Wilderness.
textByHash.9f3275e1a32e5ae9b6b76390478cb209befaef88: Thank you, you'll respawn in the Enclave from here on out.
textByHash.b0117287b31a076e2ffed5bd1b8fc888c3b0a586: Understandable, you'd have to be a brave woman to be carrying that much gold out here.
textByHash.b4686c0fb00585ab22b8d627fffffeb8a5a6b72a: I will warn you though, if you've had Teleblock cast upon you, I will not allow you back into the Enclave. You'd be a danger to the others gathered here.
textByHash.ce4bafc6f0446f272d2f9369cd6c0b8ef4751d7d: The Wilderness takes a toll on a woman's soul. Are you sure you can handle it?
textByHash.d3ec5d3612a5f08e21628c501473d1a4612a477e: Can't say I blame you, this wouldn't be my choice either.
